call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. I'm alright. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: Actually, I was thinking of using it for a down payment on a car. 
Agent: Perfect! That works great. The terms are very flexible. We have options from 24 to 60 months. What kind of monthly payment are you comfortable with? 
Eleanor: I'd like to keep it under $200 a month, if possible. 
Agent: Let me see… Okay, with a 60-month term, your monthly payment would be around $198. Does that sound good? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that sounds pretty good. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150. And, of course, the monthly interest. But honestly, compared to other lenders, we're very competitive. 
Eleanor: Okay. And there's no penalty for paying it off early? 
Agent: Absolutely not! We encourage it. 
Eleanor: Alright, then let's do it. 
Agent: Fantastic! I just need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Financial Freedom. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $2500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I'm already on a fixed income. 
Agent: Well, sir, it depends on your credit score… 
Robert: (Interrupting) I don't need a lecture on my credit score! I'm not interested. Don't call me again! (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Secure Finance. Your friend, Michael, referred you for a Personal Loan. How are you today? 
Jessica: Hey David, I'm good, thanks. Yeah, Michael mentioned you guys. I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: That's fantastic! We can definitely help with that. Based on your profile, we are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. 
Jessica: Okay, that sounds… reasonable. What are the terms? 
Agent: We offer terms from 12 to 72 months. What kind of monthly payment are you looking at? 
Jessica: I'd like to keep it around $300, if possible. 
Agent: Let's see… A 60-month term would put you at approximately $332. We can also look at a 72-month term, which would lower the monthly payment, but increase the total interest paid. 
Jessica: Hmm… I'm a little worried about the total interest. 
Agent: I understand. We can explore different scenarios. We also offer a rate discount if you set up automatic payments. That could save you a significant amount over the life of the loan. 
Jessica: Oh, really? How much? 
Agent: About 0.25%. So, your rate would drop to 12.25%. 
Jessica: Okay, that's good. And what's the process for applying? 
Agent: It's very simple. I can send you a secure link to complete the application online. It takes about 10 minutes. 
Jessica: Alright, send it over.

Agent: Hello, David? This is Lisa from Premier Financial. I see you expressed interest in our Signature Credit Card. 
David: Yeah, I was just looking at the rewards program. 
Agent: Excellent! We are pre-approving you for a $5000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 17.99%. It offers 2% cashback on all purchases. 
David: 17.99%? That's a bit high, isn't it? I have a pretty good credit score. 
Agent: It is, sir, but it's based on a preliminary assessment. We can review your full credit report to see if we can qualify you for a lower rate. 
David: I'm already getting offers from other companies with lower rates. 
Agent: I understand. We can certainly try to match that. Could you tell me what rates you've been offered? 
David: I'm not really comfortable sharing that information. I think I'll just go with one of those other offers. 
Agent: Okay, sir. I understand. If you change your mind, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Sarah calling from Financial Freedom. We're offering a… 
Maria: (Interrupting) You guys called me yesterday! And the day before! I told you I'm not interested! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $3000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%. 
Maria: 24.99?! You're trying to rip me off! I'm on a fixed income! I want my number removed from your list! 
Agent: I… uh… I can certainly do that. 
Maria: Do it now! And don't ever call me again! (Click)
